chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. B.A. No. S—17 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on M.A. No.95/2018 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.96/2018 (E/A) 3. For Katcha Peshi 05.01.2018 Mr. J.K. Jarwar, Advocate along with applicant / accused.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Applicant / accused Riaz Hussain S/o Janib Ali seeks protective bail in Crime No.46/2017 registered at Police Station Cantt. under Sections 452, 147, 148, 149, 504, 114, 109, 324, 506/2, 354, 511, 337-A(ii), 337-L(ii), 337-H(ii) PPC. It is, inter alia, contended that applicant / accused is prepared to surrender before the trial Court but apprehends his arrest as NBW has been issued against him by the trial Court. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the applicant / accused for a period of five days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (fifty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of the NBW for the period of five days shall stand suspended. Applicant / accused shall surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of five days or when the applicant surrenders before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. In case applicant / accused fails to surrender before the trial Court, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Bail application stands disposed of. __________________ J U D G E A.B.Larik
